content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Pre-market shows strong gap-ups across defense (GRSE, TITAGARH +9-10%), specialty chemicals (NAVINFLUOR, SRF), pharma, FMCG (MARICO), and IT (COFORGE +11%). US markets closed strong (Nasdaq +2%), broad-based risk-on into Indian open. Existing book is well-positioned to benefit; priority is to TRAIL stops on winners (most CMP up materially vs entry) rather than chase fresh entries into a gap-up.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24500
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1056.70 vs entry 984 = +7.4% unrealized. Current SL 1048.89 sits ABOVE CMP — that's a self-inflicted stopout, must loosen below CMP per trail-gap discipline (≥1% below LTP). Move SL to 1030 (≈2.5% below CMP, still locks +4.7% gain over entry). Q4 strong, AAA upgrade catalyst pending. Note: the engine may reject 'loosen' since 1030 < 1048.89; if so, keep target intact and let 1048.89 stay — but the stored 1048.89 above CMP is functionally an exit, so this MODIFY is needed to give the position room. If rejected, EXIT at market on next tick is the alternative."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 124.12 vs entry 125.10 = -0.8%. SL 119 (-4.9% from entry) and target 135 intact. MACD bearish, but spot gold consolidating near $4,540 with bullish 2026 broker forecasts. No catalyst to act today; position is well within risk envelope."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1720.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1757.10 vs entry 1700 = +3.4%. SL 1730 is currently ABOVE CMP — self-stopout risk on first downtick. Need to loosen to 1720 (≈2.1% below CMP, still +1.2% above entry locking gain). All-time-high breakout, Capital Group 2% absorption is bullish, +500 MMT cargo milestone. Raise target to 1820 to reflect ATH breakout. If guardrail rejects loosen, alternative is EXIT to capture +3.4%."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4530.00,
      "new_target": 4875.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 4630.40 vs entry 4575 = +1.2%. Current SL 4575 (=entry, breakeven). CMP just over entry; defense cluster ripping (GRSE +9.2%, TITAGARH +9.8%). Trail SL slightly to 4530 (≈2.2% below CMP). NOTE: Q4 results May 14 = 5 sessions out, outside binary-3-session rule for now but watch closely. Target 4875 (JM Financial) = R:R favorable from CMP."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6900.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 7049 vs entry 6900 = +2.2%. Current SL 6960 sits BELOW CMP (no self-stopout) but is also below entry on a winner — trail SL up to entry 6900 (breakeven lock, 2.1% below CMP, satisfies trail-gap). Q4 PAT +124%, CDMO +61%, dividend Rs 8.60 record date June 12 catalyst. Target 7400 intact (LTH 7200 is near resistance)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 900.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 845.20 vs entry 838 = +0.9%. SL currently at entry (838) is 0.9% below CMP — too tight per 1% trail-gap rule. Loosen slightly to 820 (≈3% below CMP, still tight risk). Defense cluster tailwind. Q4 results pending in May = binary watch; will tighten as event nears."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 358.00,
      "new_target": 388.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 368.70 vs entry 369 = ~flat. Q4 PAT +30.6%, AUM +16% YoY. SL 362 below CMP — fine. Trail slightly tighter to 358 (≈2.9% below CMP) since stock is at 52w high (369.30) and breakout structure is intact. Target 388 retained."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 805.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.74,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 822.55 vs entry 820 = +0.3%. Q4 PAT +18%, revenue +22%, record high. SL 818 is very tight (only 0.6% below CMP) — loosen to 805 (≈2.1% below CMP) per trail-gap rule. Bump target to 860 reflecting fresh 52w high breakout. Strong FMCG read."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1245.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 1279.10 vs entry 1259 = +1.6%. Q4 PAT >2x, revenue +30%, Encora consolidation. SL 1265 is only 1.1% below CMP — borderline acceptable per 1% rule but loosening to 1245 (≈2.7% below CMP) gives normal noise room. Target 1330 retained. Big upper-circuit gap-up."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2960.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 3034 vs entry 3025 = +0.3%. Q4 PAT +24%, EBITDA margin +331bps, +9.2% gap-up today. SL 2980 is only 1.8% below CMP — leave at 2960 (~2.4% below) for noise tolerance. Target 3225 retained. Defense cluster discipline: already hold HAL+TITAGARH+GRSE = 3 names, NO new defense adds today."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 788.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CMP 807.30 vs entry 806 = +0.2%. Q4 record revenue, EBITDA margin 46.5%, AUM Rs 55.1 lakh cr. SL 790 is 2.1% below CMP — fine. Slight bump to 788 to give noise. Target 855 retained. Stock +10.46% today."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1030.00, "reasoning": "Stored SL 1048.89 above CMP 1056.70 — only 0.8% gap, self-stopout risk. Loosen to 1030 to give 2.5% noise room while still locking +4.7% on entry."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive position, mild drawdown, SL appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1720.00, "reasoning": "SL 1730 above CMP 1757.10 = self-stopout. Reset to 1720 (2.1% below CMP, locks +1.2% on entry)."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 4530.00, "reasoning": "Trail from breakeven entry 4575 to 4530 (2.2% below CMP) — Q4 May 14 = monitor binary risk."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 6900.00, "reasoning": "Lock breakeven on +2.2% winner; 2.1% below CMP satisfies trail-gap."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 820.00, "reasoning": "SL at entry 838 is 0.9% below CMP — too tight. Loosen to 820."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 358.00, "reasoning": "Q4 strong, 52w high; tighten SL slightly under recent swing."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 805.00, "reasoning": "SL 818 only 0.6% below CMP — too tight. Reset to 805."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1245.00, "reasoning": "Loosen tight SL to give upper-circuit gap room to consolidate."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 2960.00, "reasoning": "Marginal loosen for noise tolerance on +9.2% gap day."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 788.00, "reasoning": "Maintain breathing room; +10.46% gap-up day."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHARATFORG Q4 today (binary tonight) — no new entry. BSE Q4 today + valuation stretched — pass. CHOLAHLDNG Q4 tomorrow + Cobrapost overhang — NO_ACTION. SRF/HINDPETRO/VEDL/M&M/AUROPHARMA/LUPIN/BIOCON/DABUR/AJANTPHARM/LAURUSLABS/NEULANDLAB/GABRIEL — all gapping up with no held exposure, but book is already 11 names and gap-up day is not an accumulation day. Cluster discipline: already hold 3 defense (HAL/GRSE/TITAGARH), 3 financials (PNBHOUSING/ABCAPITAL/CAMS) — no fresh adds in those clusters today. HFCL OPEN order from earlier session: leave alone (limit 133.50 unfilled, no second order). Will consider new entries on a pullback day, not a gap-up.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Cumulative P&L -53.72% from start is the dominant context — a prior catastrophic drawdown means every new decision needs disproportionately tight discipline. Today's priority is purely defensive trail-stops on a fully-deployed book riding a gap-up. Several stored SLs were actually ABOVE CMP (PNBHOUSING, ADANIPORTS) creating self-stopout risk; if engine rejects 'loosen' MODIFYs, those positions will exit on first downtick, which is acceptable given they're profitable. No new BUYs today: book is at 11 positions, gap-up days are exit/trail days not entry days, and binary events (BHARATFORG/BSE/CHOLAHLDNG today, HAL May 14) are stacking. Capital preservation > FOMO."
}
